freeInsider.title: Free first sourcing check
freeInsider.slogan: A practical first read from Agent Huang on the China side.
freeInsider.whyFree: I've spent 10 years in the system, and I'm tired of seeing honest Western buyers getting scammed or frustrated. I want to build a relationship first. If I can save you from a bad deal with a 10-minute chat, I've done my job as a friend. If you need me for an on-site audit later, you know where to find me.

included.title: Quick Factory Check
included.body: Send me a link or a name; I will tell you if they look like a real factory or a "bedroom" trader in 5 minutes.

included.title: Cultural & Business Translator
included.body: Confused by a factory's "vague" reply? I translate the real meaning behind their Chinese business talk.

included.title: General Sourcing Advice
included.body: Tips on shipping, local holidays, or market trends. No strings attached.

bullets.title: On-site AQL Inspection
bullets.body: Full check on functionality, packaging, and quantities before you pay the final 70%.

bullets.title: Timeline Monitoring
bullets.body: I'm the "headache" the factory fears. I monitor production lines so they don't miss your shipping date.

bullets.title: Dispute Resolution
bullets.body: If issues are found, I handle the rework negotiation on the factory floor, so you don't have to argue across the ocean.

bullets.title: Global DDP Shipping
bullets.body: Sea, air, or rail. We handle customs and taxes so your goods arrive shelf-ready.

meta.title: About Agent Huang
meta.description: Ten years in China’s supply chain, Shanghai-based, zero factory commissions. Why Agent Huang built Huang Sourcing.

About.tagline: 10 years inside the Chinese supply chain system. Zero ties to factories. 100% loyal to your order.
About.s1Body: For a decade, I worked deep inside cross-border e-commerce and enterprise supply chain systems. I built and integrated that machinery for major companies—including across the Greater Bay Area—and I saw the data behind serious trade. But I kept seeing the same pain on the ground: the hidden “unspoken rules,” the kickbacks, overseas buyers scammed by “bedroom” traders on marketplaces, and premium prices for poor quality while “free” agents took the factory’s side. I knew how the game was played, I knew it was broken, and I knew how to stand on yours—not theirs.
About.s2Before: Recently, AI disrupted my tech job. It forced me to rethink the future of global trade. AI is amazing—it can translate emails perfectly and build beautiful sourcing websites. But here is what AI cannot do:
About.s2Highlight: AI cannot walk onto a noisy factory floor.
About.s2After: AI cannot feel the texture of a fabric, test the physical hinge of a box, or catch a factory manager quietly replacing premium materials with cheap alternatives. In an automated world, physical presence is the ultimate luxury.
About.s3Intro: I founded Huang Sourcing and became Agent Huang for two honest reasons:
About.s3First: First: I wanted to build a profitable, sustainable business for myself by providing genuine, transparent value that traditional agents refuse to give.
About.s3Second: Second: I wanted to be the ultimate physical firewall for global buyers. Overseas buyers do not need another middleman—they need someone who gets the local “business games,” speaks the language, and can walk the line and say, “This is unacceptable.” I know exactly how factories play games, and I know how to stop them.
About.s4Body: I do not take factory commissions. I do not participate in the “Yes Culture,” where agents say yes to everything just to keep the factory happy. You pay a flat, transparent rate. I put on my boots, drive to the facility, open the cartons, and take macro photos of the real defects — not generic rows in a fancy office spreadsheet. I go where the problem is, tell you the truth, and protect your margins. I am your eyes, your ears, and your enforcer in China.
About.cta: I am based in Shanghai—at the center of a massive manufacturing and export hub—and I travel across China when your line or your audit needs me there.
About.locationNote: Strategically based in Shanghai—the heart of East China’s manufacturing and export engine. Nationwide travel for inspections and factory work.
About.portraitAlt: Agent Huang — founder of Huang Sourcing
About.contextImageAlt: Shanghai and China manufacturing context — local hub, national reach
